gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6750 XT (radeonsi, navi22, LLVM 19.1.1, DRM 3.59, 6.11.0-25-generic)
notes: I tried, GE-proton 10-1, Proton Experimental, Proton 10.0-1 and Proton 9.0 and it crashes in the exact same place. Game starts, spash screens, then when it asks to press 'Space' or 'Start' it crashes. I guess it doesn't like the desktop display being at 4K. Quite strange seeing as the game starts in 4K.
title: Inversion™
